Jeff Roberts and David Olinger November-December 2005
Data & DatabasesEducation

Jeff Roberts and David Olinger explore discrepancies in reported assault data in Colorado schools, using police reports to reveal underreported violence.

Jason Grotto September - October 2002
EducationBusiness & Economy

An investigation reveals how taxpayer dollars benefit lobbyists and contractors instead of students in Miami-Dade County Public Schools.

Holly Hacker September - October 2002
Data & DatabasesInvestigative MethodsEducation
